items.name: Wiener Schnitzel
items.description: Classic veal, breadcrumbed and pan-fried golden. Served with lemon wedge and parsley potatoes.

items.name: Jägerschnitzel
items.description: Pork schnitzel with a rich wild mushroom and cream sauce. Hunter-style, just like Oma made it.

items.name: Maple Schnitzel
items.description: Our Canadian twist — chicken schnitzel glazed with Ontario maple syrup, served with pickled cabbage slaw.

items.name: Käseschnitzel
items.description: Pork schnitzel topped with melted Emmental cheese and a light white wine sauce.

items.name: Kartoffelsalat
items.description: Warm German potato salad with bacon, mustard vinaigrette, and fresh chives.

items.name: Rotkohl
items.description: Braised red cabbage with apple and caraway. Sweet, tangy, and slow-cooked.

items.name: Pretzel Bun & Butter
items.description: House-baked pretzel bun with lightly salted cultured butter.

items.name: Fries mit Curry
items.description: Hand-cut fries served with our house currywurst sauce. Berlin street food, Toronto portion.

items.name: Helles Lager
items.description: Crisp Bavarian-style lager brewed locally in collaboration with Bellwoods Brewery.

items.name: Riesling
items.description: Off-dry Mosel Riesling — floral, bright, and the perfect companion to a schnitzel.

items.name: Hugo Spritz
items.description: Elderflower prosecco with fresh mint and a splash of soda. Light and refreshing.

items.name: Apfelschorle
items.description: Classic German sparkling apple juice. Crisp, clean, and non-alcoholic.
